code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the code would compile for Java 17, potentially missing Java 21 features or failing if Java 21-only APIs are used.

code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the compiler release configuration to 21 in the plugin configuration block.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin configuration aligns with the property change to target Java 21.
